name: Core data
description: Data that Members shall exchange on a free and unrestricted basis to underpin the services they provide for the protection of life and property and for the well-being of all nations. (Resolution 1 (Cg-Ext(2021)))

name: Recommended data
description: Data that should also be exchanged by Members to support Earth system monitoring and prediction efforts. (Resolution 1 (Cg-Ext(2021)))

name: no limitation
description: No limitation on distribution or use
